case_title: MARA RACHEL GOLDWASSER VS. FIONA SHAINI

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF INABILITY TO SERVE DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDWASSER, MARA RACHEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-29-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-12-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY GOLDWASSER, MARA RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT SHAINI, FIONA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDWASSER, MARA RACHEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDWASSER, MARA RACHEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHAINI, FIONA THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT IMPROPERLY REQUIRED $600.00 FROM PLAINTIFF IN EXCHANGE FOR ASSIGNMENT OF DEFENDANT'S INTEREST IN THE SECURITY DEPOSIT HELD BY THE LANDLORD. THE COURT DOES NOT EXPRESS AN OPINION WHETHER THE LANDLORD NOW HOLDS $600.00, OR $1200.00 AS A SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
